name: @tootallnate/ff7-battle
description: Pure-JS parser for Final Fantasy VII PC battle-model file formats inside `battle.lgp`. Decodes the 52-byte binary HRC master file (the compiled equivalent of the field models' text HRC), derives sibling bone-mesh / texture / animation filenames from the master's 2-char prefix, and decodes the bit-packed delta-compressed animation pack. P-mesh + TEX files reuse `@tootallnate/ff7-pc-model` (identical format) — this package adds only the battle-specific master + animation parsers.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
